response.overview: Depicting the life story of a group of children, namely Razlan, Roy, Remy, Kuzie and Lim, from their school days until adulthood. Razlan is sent by his parents to the village to live with his grandparents. His parents are going abroad for two months on work matters. In the village, Razlan makes new friends, namely Roy, Remy, Kuzie and Lim. Razlan enjoys living in his grandfather's village. Razlan does many activities with his friends such as cycling, fishing, playing ball and so on. However, Razlan does not stay in the village for long as he needs to follow his parents to London. Razlan is in a dilemma.
response.title: Geng Basikal (TV1)
